nodes.context: Group of Jewish-American mobsters from New York City, based in Williamsburg, led by Meyer, Irving, and Willie Shapiro.
Organized crime group that carried out murders on orders from Buchalter; members included Martin Goldstein, Abe Reles, the Amberg brothers, Frank Abbandando, and Harry Maione.

edges.evidence_quote: On orders from Buchalter, Willie was killed by Murder, Inc. members Martin "Bugsy" Goldstein and Abe "Kid Twist" Reles
edges.context: Murder, Inc. killed Willie Shapiro on orders from Buchalter, indicating a conflict between the Shapiro Brothers and Murder, Inc.
